hero.eyebrow: High Performance Custom Home Builder & Renovator
hero.subtitle: Since 2005, Blackfish Homes has delivered top-quality custom homes and renovations across the North Shore, Vancouver, and Vancouver Island.

projects_lead: A selection of custom homes and renovations built to the highest standard of performance and design.

services.name: Custom Homes
services.description: Ground-up new builds designed and constructed to the highest performance standards, tailored to your site, lifestyle, and vision.

services.name: Major Renovations
services.description: Thoughtful transformations of existing homes, from full gut renovations to strategic additions that elevate how you live.

services.name: High-Performance Building
services.description: Energy-efficient construction with superior building envelope design, ensuring comfort, durability, and reduced operating costs.

services.name: Project Management
services.description: End-to-end coordination of your build team, trades, timeline, and budget so you can focus on the excitement of building.

process.title: Discovery
process.description: We listen to your vision, review your site, and understand your goals before anything else.

process.title: Planning & Design
process.description: Working alongside your architect and design team, we refine the plan to balance ambition with buildability.

process.title: Construction
process.description: Our experienced crew brings the design to life with meticulous attention to detail and open communication throughout.

process.title: Handover
process.description: A thorough walkthrough and everything you need to enjoy your new home from day one.

paragraphs: Established in 2005, Blackfish Homes has consistently delivered top-quality, high-performance new homes and renovations. By focusing exclusively on residential projects, we help our clients make clear and informed choices while ensuring we pay attention to every detail.

Named from the indigenous word for the Orca — a creature that prioritizes family and communication — our company exemplifies the idea of home. Fueled by creativity yet rooted in open communication and a common-sense approach, we work alongside you and the rest of the build team to plan and deliver your perfect home.

trust: Exclusively residential — custom homes and renovations only
Serving the North Shore and Vancouver Island since 2005

contact.subtitle: Whether you're envisioning a new custom home or transforming your current one, we'd love to hear about your project.

footer.description: High-performance custom home builder and renovator serving the North Shore, Greater Vancouver, and Vancouver Island since 2005.
